sentences.arabic: زَادَتْ أَسْعَارُ الْمَوَادِّ الْغِذَائِيَّةِ فِي الْأَسْوَاقِ الْمَحَلِّيَّةِ هَذَا الشَّهْرَ.
sentences.translation: Cijene prehrambenih proizvoda na lokalnim tržištima porasle su ovog mjeseca.
sentences.translationEn: Food prices in local markets have increased this month.

sentences.arabic: يَبْحَثُ النَّاسُ عَنِ السِّلَعِ الرَّخِيصَةِ لِتَوْفِيرِ الْمَالِ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi traže jeftinu robu kako bi uštedjeli novac.
sentences.translationEn: People are looking for cheap goods to save money.

sentences.arabic: تَقُولُ الْحُكُومَةُ إِنَّ السَّبَبَ هُوَ ارْتِفَاعُ تَكَالِيفِ النَّقْلِ.
sentences.translation: Vlada kaže da je razlog tome porast troškova transporta.
sentences.translationEn: The government says the reason is the rise in transportation costs.

sentences.arabic: يَجْتَمِعُ التُّجَّارُ لِمُنَاقَشَةِ كَيْفِيَّةِ خَفْضِ الْأَسْعَارِ لِلْمُوَاطِنِينَ.
sentences.translation: Trgovci se sastaju kako bi razgovarali o tome kako sniziti cijene za građane.
sentences.translationEn: Merchants are meeting to discuss how to lower prices for citizens.

sentences.arabic: يُفَضِّلُ الْبَعْضُ شِرَاءَ الْمُنْتَجَاتِ الْوَطَنِيَّةِ لِدَعْمِ الِاقْتِصَادِ.
sentences.translation: Neki radije kupuju domaće proizvode kako bi podržali ekonomiju.
sentences.translationEn: Some prefer to buy national products to support the economy.
